writers.composer: Victor Pool/Justin Gammella/Ruben Christopher den Boer/Meron Mengist/Joren van der Voort

lyrics.text: Talk to me
lyrics.translation: 和我谈谈吧

lyrics.text: Spill the secrets you've been keeping
lyrics.translation: 向我吐露那深藏于你心底的秘密

lyrics.text: Life cuts deep
lyrics.translation: 生活诚然充满坎坷

lyrics.text: Let me help pick up the pieces
lyrics.translation: 但请让我助你重拾信心

lyrics.text: You're not alone, I'm by your side
lyrics.translation: 若我如影随形 你便不会再感孤寂

lyrics.text: Don't you know, don't you know
lyrics.translation: 你知道吗

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire with you
lyrics.translation: 我愿与你携手 走过刀山火海

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire
lyrics.translation: 我愿为你赴汤蹈火

lyrics.text: No matter what, I'll make it right
lyrics.translation: 就算误入歧途 我也会使我们重回正轨

lyrics.text: Don't you know, don't you know
lyrics.translation: 你并不知道我

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire with you
lyrics.translation: 我愿与你一同 穿过熊熊烈焰

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire
lyrics.translation: 我愿为你承受煎熬

lyrics.text: I'm not an angel, I'm not a saint
lyrics.translation: 我并非天使 更非圣人

lyrics.text: I've been a closed book full of mistakes
lyrics.translation: 我曾如一本紧闭的书 晦涩难懂却又荒诞不经

lyrics.text: But when you're broken, when you're in pain
lyrics.translation: 但当你怆然心碎 痛苦不堪之时

lyrics.text: Oooh, ooh
I'll walk through fire with you
lyrics.translation: 我愿与你携手 走过刀山火海

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire
lyrics.translation: 我愿为你赴汤蹈火

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire with you
lyrics.translation: 我愿与你一同 穿过熊熊烈焰

lyrics.text: I'll walk through fire
lyrics.translation: 我愿为你承受煎熬

lyrics.text: You know I
lyrics.translation: 你知道吗

lyrics.text: Don't pretend to be a savior
lyrics.translation: 我不会假装自己能够拯救你于水火

lyrics.text: But let me in, yeah
lyrics.translation: 但请让我住进你的心

lyrics.text: I promise nobody can break us
lyrics.translation: 我发誓 没有人能够拆散我们

lyrics.text: You're not alone, I'm by your side
lyrics.translation: 若我如影随形 你便不会再感孤寂
